title: Linked-Intent Development
tagline: How to write code when your compiler speaks English.
description: Linked-Intent Development for agentic coding — structure the English your agent compiles so design, specs, tests, and code stay in sync. Claude Code plugins; rule-file adapters for Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, and other tools.

quickstart.note: Register the plugin source in Claude Code.
Install the arrow-maintenance overlay for spec-to-code coherence audits.
Bootstrap your project — adds a docs/ tree and an AGENTS.md (symlinked to CLAUDE.md).

experimental.name: lid-experimental
experimental.blurb: Opt-in experimental skills that aren't part of the core workflow. Currently bundles bidirectional-differential — audits EARS↔code coherence by reconstructing each side from the other in fresh Claude sessions.
